## 1. Executive Summary
The current operational focus is directed toward critical security infrastructure maintenance. Specifically, a high-priority certificate renewal process is underway to prevent service interruption. Current status shows 1 pending item with an approaching deadline.

## 2. Pending & Risks
* Certificate renewal (Expires 4/5) (From: Minjun Lee (Internal), To: David Kim (External)): This item remains unresolved after two follow-up attempts. There is a high risk of service expiration if the renewal is not completed before the 4/5 deadline.

## 3. Management Gap
Communication bottleneck identified with David Kim (External) regarding the certificate renewal (Expires 4/5). Despite multiple follow-ups by Minjun Lee (Internal), the lack of response creates a significant risk to operational continuity. Escalation or alternative contact methods may be required to resolve the block.

## 4. Strategic Insights
The reliance on manual external coordination for critical security components like certificates introduces single points of failure. Establishing automated renewal protocols or diversifying administrative contacts with external partners is recommended to mitigate similar risks in future cycles.
